children.text: Pay of members of reserve components for inactive-duty training to obtain or maintain an aeronautical rating or designation
Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary concerned, a member of the National Guard or a member of a reserve component of a uniformed service who is receiving aviation incentive pay under

children.tail: and is entitled to compensation under
is entitled to such compensation for a number of periods of inactive-duty training each month sufficient for the member to obtain or maintain an aeronautical rating or designation.

children.text: Pub. L. 118–31, div. A, title VI, § 602(a)
